sections.body: I am applying for the Lecturer in Economics position at Northbridge University.

claims.text: I am applying for the Lecturer in Economics position.

sections.heading: Research
sections.body: My applied economics research examines regional labour-market adjustment and has produced two peer-reviewed articles.

claims.text: My applied economics research has produced two peer-reviewed articles.

sections.heading: Teaching
sections.body: I have designed and delivered Applied Econometrics seminars across two academic years.

sections.body: I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to Northbridge University's teaching and research community.
